opportunitiesData.title: BRACKET,VEHICULAR
opportunitiesData.fullParentPathName: DEPT OF DEFENSE.DEFENSE LOGISTICS AGENCY.DLA LAND AND MARITIME
opportunitiesData.description: This solicitation is issued under Simplified Acquisition Procedures. The following FAR provisions and clauses apply: FAR 52.204-7 System for Award Management; FAR 52.204-13 System for Award Management Maintenance; FAR 52.204-24; FAR 52.204-25; FAR 52.212-1; FAR 52.212-3; FAR 52.212-4; FAR 52.212-5; FAR 52.219-6 Notice of Total Small Business Set-Aside; FAR 52.222-3; FAR 52.222-19; FAR 52.222-21; FAR 52.222-26; FAR 52.222-35; FAR 52.222-36; FAR 52.222-50; FAR 52.225-13; FAR 52.232-33; FAR 52.232-40; FAR 52.233-1; FAR 52.233-3; FAR 52.233-4; FAR 52.243-1; FAR 52.246-2; FAR 52.247-34; FAR 52.249-8. DFARS provisions and clauses: DFARS 252.203-7000; DFARS 252.204-7012 Safeguarding Covered Defense Information and Cyber Incident Reporting; DFARS 252.204-7019; DFARS 252.204-7020; DFARS 252.204-7021; DFARS 252.211-7003 Item Unique Identification and Valuation; DFARS 252.225-7001 Buy American and Balance of Payments Program; DFARS 252.232-7003; DFARS 252.232-7006; DFARS 252.244-7000; DFARS 252.247-7023 Transportation of Supplies by Sea. See attached Statement of Work for critical safety item requirements.
